hero.subtitle: Hundreds of H5 games — no download needed, play instantly

meta.siteTitle: LeYou - Play Hundreds of Games Online
meta.siteDesc: LeYou - Hundreds of H5 games, no download needed. Action, puzzle, casual, arcade and more.

action.name: Action
action.description: Fast-paced action games to test your reflexes

racing.name: Racing
racing.description: Speed and thrills on the racetrack

board.name: Board
board.description: Chess and card game battles of wit

2048.description: Classic number-merging puzzle. Slide tiles to combine matching numbers and reach 2048!

snake.title: Snake
snake.description: Classic snake game. Control the snake to eat food, grow longer, and avoid hitting walls!

memory.title: Memory Match
memory.description: Test your memory! Flip cards to find all matching pairs in the shortest time possible.

click-speed.title: Click Speed Test
click-speed.description: Challenge your click speed! Click as fast as possible in limited time and see your CPS!

reaction-test.title: Reaction Time Test
reaction-test.description: Test your reflexes! Click when the screen changes color and measure your reaction time.

tic-tac-toe.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
tic-tac-toe.description: Classic Tic-Tac-Toe. Play against AI and get three in a row to win!

breakout.title: Breakout
breakout.description: Classic brick-breaker. Control the paddle to bounce the ball and destroy all bricks!

dino-runner.title: Dino Runner
dino-runner.description: Enhanced Chrome dino game. Jump to dodge obstacles and run as far as possible!

flappy-bird.title: Flappy Bird
flappy-bird.description: Classic Flappy Bird. Tap to keep the bird flying and navigate through pipe gaps!

minesweeper.title: Minesweeper
minesweeper.description: Classic minesweeper. Reveal all safe cells, flag the mines, and use logic to win!

tetris.title: Tetris
tetris.description: Classic Tetris. Rotate and place falling blocks to complete lines and score points!

space-shooter.title: Space Shooter
space-shooter.description: Pilot a spaceship, shoot enemies, dodge asteroids, and chase high scores!

pong.title: Pong
pong.description: Classic Pong. Battle the AI — first to 7 points wins!

sudoku.title: Sudoku
sudoku.description: Classic Sudoku. Fill in numbers 1-9 so each row, column, and box has no repeats.

racing-game.title: Speed Racing
racing-game.description: Dodge traffic and race at top speed! Test your reflexes and driving skills.

wordle.title: Wordle
wordle.description: Wordle-style word guessing. You have 5 attempts to guess the hidden 5-letter word!

whack-a-mole.title: Whack-a-Mole
whack-a-mole.description: Classic whack-a-mole! Moles pop up randomly — smash them with a hammer for points!

doodle-jump.title: Doodle Jump
doodle-jump.description: Control the doodle character jumping upward, land on platforms, and don't fall!

color-match.title: Color Match
color-match.description: Match the color of the text, not the word itself. A true test of attention!

platform-runner.title: Platform Runner
platform-runner.description: 2D platformer. Overcome obstacles, collect coins, and reach the finish line!

slide-puzzle.title: Slide Puzzle
slide-puzzle.description: Slide tiles back into order. Rearrange 15 numbered tiles as quickly as you can!

match-three.title: Match Three
match-three.description: Classic match-3. Swap adjacent gems to line up three or more and score points!

sokoban.title: Sokoban
sokoban.description: Classic warehouse puzzle. Push all crates onto the target spots — plan every move!

aim-trainer.title: Aim Trainer
aim-trainer.description: Sharpen your aim and reaction speed! Hit as many targets as possible in limited time.

rhythm-tap.title: Rhythm Tap
rhythm-tap.description: Tap to the beat as notes reach the target zone! Challenge your sense of rhythm.

asteroid-dodge.title: Asteroid Dodge
asteroid-dodge.description: Navigate your ship through the meteor shower! The longer you survive, the higher your score!

gomoku.title: Gomoku
gomoku.description: Classic Gomoku. Play against AI — first to connect five in a row wins!

solitaire.title: Solitaire
solitaire.description: Classic Klondike solitaire. Sort all cards by suit from Ace to King in the foundation!

reversi.title: Reversi
reversi.description: Classic Reversi (Othello). Surround your opponent's pieces to flip them and occupy the most squares!

contra.title: Contra
contra.description: Classic pixel-art run-and-gun. Eliminate enemies, collect weapons, and defeat the Boss!

pacman.title: Pac-Man
pacman.description: Classic Pac-Man maze. Eat all dots, dodge ghosts, and use power pellets to fight back!

bubble-shooter.title: Bubble Shooter
bubble-shooter.description: Classic bubble shooter. Aim and fire to match three same-colored bubbles and clear the board!

tank-battle.title: Tank Battle
tank-battle.description: Classic Tank Battle. Command your tank, defend the base, and destroy all enemy tanks!

fruit-ninja.title: Fruit Ninja
fruit-ninja.description: Classic Fruit Ninja. Slice flying fruit but don't hit the bombs!

connect-four.title: Connect Four
connect-four.description: Classic Connect Four. Take turns dropping pieces — connect four in a row to win!

airplane-war.title: Airplane War
airplane-war.description: Classic vertical shooter. Command your fighter jet, shoot down enemies, and collect power-ups!

mahjong-link.title: Mahjong Link
mahjong-link.description: Classic Mahjong Link. Find two identical tiles and connect them with at most 3 turns to clear!

bowling.title: Bowling
bowling.description: Classic bowling. Adjust direction and power to knock down all the pins and bowl a perfect game!

pinball.title: Pinball
pinball.description: Classic pinball machine. Control the flippers to keep the ball in play and hit targets!

24-game.title: 24 Game
24-game.description: Classic 24 card math puzzle. Use four cards with +−×÷ to make exactly 24!

rock-paper-scissors.title: Rock Paper Scissors
rock-paper-scissors.description: Classic RPS! Compete against AI — first to win 5 rounds takes the match!

blackjack.title: Blackjack
blackjack.description: Classic Blackjack. Beat the dealer by getting as close to 21 as possible without busting!

battleship.title: Battleship
battleship.description: Classic Battleship! Place your fleet on a 10×10 grid and take turns firing — sink all enemy ships to win!

air-hockey.title: Air Hockey
air-hockey.description: Fast-paced Air Hockey! Control your paddle to hit the puck — first to score 7 goals wins!

checkers.title: Checkers
checkers.description: Classic Checkers! Move pieces diagonally on an 8×8 board, jump over opponents, and capture all enemy pieces!

bomberman.title: Bomberman
bomberman.description: Classic Bomberman! Place bombs to blast walls and defeat enemies — don't get caught in your own explosion!

war-card.title: War (Card Game)
war-card.description: Classic War card game! Both players flip a card simultaneously — higher card wins all!

chinese-chess.title: Chinese Chess
chinese-chess.description: Traditional Chinese Chess (Xiangqi)! Control red pieces against AI's blue side — checkmate the general to win!

boxing.title: Boxing
boxing.description: Intense boxing match! Use A/D to punch, S to guard — drain your opponent's stamina and win the bout!

texas-holdem.title: Texas Hold'em
texas-holdem.description: The world's most popular poker! Beat the AI dealer using your hole cards and community cards!
